sentence: 现代科技让我们的生活更加便利。
pinyin: Xiàndài kējì ràng wǒmen de shēnghuó gèngjiā biànlì.
english: Modern science and technology make our lives more convenient.

meaning: 1. entire; 2. total; 3. global; 4. the (whole) world; 5. worldwide
sentence: 这款应用在全球拥有数亿用户。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn yìngyòng zài quánqiú yōngyǒu shù yì yònghù.
english: This app has hundreds of millions of users worldwide.

meaning: middling; average; impartial; (Hong Kong) secondary school that uses C
sentence: 他这次考试成绩中中，不好也不差。
pinyin: Tā zhè cì kǎo shì chéng jì zhōng zhōng, bù hǎo yě bù chà.
english: His exam results this time were middling — not great, not bad either.

sentence: 所有与会人员请准时到场。
pinyin: Suǒyǒu yù huì rényuán qǐng zhǔnshí dào chǎng.
english: All participants in the meeting please arrive on time.

meaning: 1. to push (for acceptance of a plan); 2. to push forward; 3. to promo
sentence: 这项政策推动了经济发展。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng zhèngcè tuīdòng le jīngjì fāzhǎn.
english: This policy has promoted economic development.

meaning: many years; for many years; longstanding
sentence: 他们多年没见，一见面就聊个不停。
pinyin: Tā men duō nián méi jiàn, yī jiàn miàn jiù liáo ge bù tíng.
english: They hadn't seen each other for many years and couldn't stop talking once they met.

sentence: 这部影片上映第一天就卖出了很多票。
pinyin: Zhè bù yǐngpiàn shàngyìng dì yī tiān jiù màichūle hěn duō piào.
english: This movie sold a lot of tickets on its very first day of release.

sentence: 看到那道菜，她不由地笑了。
pinyin: Kàn dào nà dào cài, tā bùyóu de xiào le.
english: Seeing that dish, she couldn't help smiling.

sentence: 她日日坚持练习书法。
pinyin: Tā rìrì jiānchí liànxí shūfǎ.
english: She practices calligraphy every single day.

sentence: 这位学者发表了一篇重要论文。
pinyin: Zhè wèi xuézhě fābiǎo le yī piān zhòngyào lùnwén.
english: This scholar published an important paper.

sentence: 驾车前要了解当地的交通法规。
pinyin: Jià chē qián yào liǎo jiě dāng dì de jiāo tōng fǎ guī.
english: Before driving, you should familiarize yourself with local traffic regulations.

sentence: 不少网友在评论区留言支持她。
pinyin: Bù shǎo wǎng yǒu zài píng lùn qū liú yán zhī chí tā.
english: Quite a few netizens left comments in the comments section to support her.

sentence: 公司建立了一套新的激励机制来提高员工积极性。
pinyin: Gōng sī jiàn lì le yī tào xīn de jī lì jī zhì lái tí gāo yuán gōng jī jí xìng.
english: The company set up a new incentive mechanism to boost employee motivation.

sentence: 节日那天街上有盛大的游行。
pinyin: Jiérì nà tiān jiē shang yǒu shèngdà de yóuxíng.
english: There was a grand parade in the street on the holiday.

meaning: 1. federal; 2. federation; 3. commonwealth; 4. federal union; 5. feder
sentence: 这两个州共同组成了一个联邦。
pinyin: Zhè liǎng gè zhōu gòng tóng zǔ chéng le yī gè lián bāng.
english: These two states together formed a federation.

sentence: 上述问题需要尽快解决。
pinyin: Shàng shù wèntí xūyào jǐnkuài jiějué.
english: The above-mentioned issues need to be resolved as soon as possible.

sentence: 他在大学里学的是计算机专业。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué lǐ xué de shì jì suàn jī zhuānyè.
english: He majored in computer science at university.

sentence: 经理授权他处理这件事。
pinyin: Jīnglǐ shòuquán tā chǔlǐ zhè jiàn shì.
english: The manager authorized him to handle this matter.

sentence: 会议结束后，所有人都留下来吃饭。
pinyin: Huì yì jié shù hòu, suǒ yǒu rén dōu liú xià lái chī fàn.
english: After the meeting ended, everyone stayed for dinner.

sentence: 周末我喜欢去乡村散步，很放松。
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒ xǐhuān qù xiāng cūn sànbù, hěn fàngsōng.
english: On weekends I like to take walks in the countryside — it's very relaxing.

sentence: 两份报告之间存在明显的差异。
pinyin: Liǎng fèn bàogào zhījiān cúnzài míngxiǎn de chāyì.
english: There is a clear discrepancy between the two reports.

meaning: 1. to purchase (from various places); 2. to acquire (a company)
sentence: 这家公司以高价收购了竞争对手。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī yǐ gāojià shōugòu le jìngzhēng duìshǒu.
english: This company acquired its competitor at a high price.

sentence: 消费者越来越注重产品质量。
pinyin: Xiāofèizhě yuè lái yuè zhùzhòng chǎnpǐn zhìliàng.
english: Consumers are paying more and more attention to product quality.

sentence: 爷爷每天早上都要看日报。
pinyin: Yéye měitiān zǎoshang dōu yào kàn rìbào.
english: Grandpa reads the daily newspaper every morning.

sentence: 他平时很忙，周末更是抽不出时间。
pinyin: Tā píngshí hěn máng, zhōumò gèng shì chōu bu chū shíjiān.
english: He is usually very busy, and on weekends he has even less time to spare.

sentence: 路口禁止大型车辆通行。
pinyin: Lù kǒu jìn zhǐ dà xíng chē liàng tōng xíng.
english: Large vehicles are prohibited from passing through the intersection.

meaning: 1. to supply; 2. to provide; 3. to offer
sentence: 今年蔬菜供应充足，价格比较稳定。
pinyin: Jīnnián shūcài gōng yìng chōngzú, jiàgé bǐjiào wěndìng.
english: This year the vegetable supply is plentiful and prices are fairly stable.

sentence: 老年群体对这款应用的需求很大。
pinyin: Lǎo nián qún tǐ duì zhè kuǎn yìng yòng de xū qiú hěn dà.
english: The elderly community has a huge demand for this app.

sentence: 她是国内很知名的室内设计师。
pinyin: Tā shì guónèi hěn zhīmíng de shìnèi shèjìshī.
english: She is a well-known interior designer in the country.

sentence: 手机让我们随时都能获取最新资讯。
pinyin: Shǒujī ràng wǒmen suíshí dōu néng huòqǔ zuìxīn zī xùn.
english: Smartphones let us access the latest information at any time.

sentence: 景区里挤满了来自各地的游客。
pinyin: Jǐngqū lǐ jǐ mǎn le lái zì gè dì de yóukè.
english: The scenic area is packed with tourists from all over.

sentence: 今年工厂的产量比去年高了很多。
pinyin: Jīnnián gōngchǎng de chǎn liàng bǐ qùnián gāo le hěn duō.
english: This year the factory's output is much higher than last year.

meaning: 1. subject; 2. branch of learning; 3. course; 4. academic discipline
sentence: 数学是所有理工学科的基础。
pinyin: Shù xué shì suǒ yǒu lǐ gōng xué kē de jī chǔ.
english: Mathematics is the foundation of all STEM disciplines.

meaning: 1. medicine; 2. medical science; 3. study of medicine
sentence: 他从小就想学医学，长大后真的考上了医学院。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù xiǎng xué yīxué, zhǎngdà hòu zhēn de kǎoshàng le yīxuéyuàn.
english: He wanted to study medicine since he was little, and he really did get into medical school when he grew up.

sentence: 他们在教堂里举行了婚礼。
pinyin: Tāmen zài jiàotáng lǐ jǔxíng le hūnlǐ.
english: They held their wedding ceremony in the church.

meaning: another one is ...; the other thing is ...
sentence: 要带的东西有雨伞，再就是充电宝。
pinyin: Yào dài de dōng xī yǒu yǔ sǎn, zài jiù shì chōng diàn bǎo.
english: Things to bring include an umbrella, and also a power bank.

sentence: 这项运动男女都可以参加。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng yùndòng nánnǚ dōu kěyǐ cānjiā.
english: Both men and women can participate in this sport.

meaning: 1. to sue; 2. to bring a lawsuit against; 3. to prosecute
sentence: 他决定起诉那家公司侵权行为。
pinyin: Tā jué dìng qǐ sù nà jiā gōng sī qīn quán xíng wéi.
english: He decided to sue that company for infringement.

sentence: 请在表格里填写一下个人简介。
pinyin: Qǐng zài biǎogé lǐ tiánxiě yīxià gèrén jiǎnjiè.
english: Please fill in a brief personal introduction on the form.

meaning: likeness of a person (sketch, photo, sculpture etc)
sentence: 手机的人像模式拍出来的照片很好看。
pinyin: Shǒu jī de rén xiàng mó shì pāi chū lái de zhào piàn hěn hǎo kàn.
english: Photos taken with the phone's portrait mode look really nice.

sentence: 所有员工都享有带薪年假。
pinyin: Suǒyǒu yuángōng dōu xiǎng yǒu dài xīn niánjià.
english: All employees enjoy paid annual leave.

sentence: 他如是说，大家都点头同意。
pinyin: Tā rúshì shuō, dàjiā dōu diǎntóu tóngyì.
english: He said thus, and everyone nodded in agreement.

sentence: 他三次应试，终于及第，喜极而泣。
pinyin: Tā sān cì yìngshì, zhōngyú jídì, xǐ jí ér qì.
english: After sitting the exam three times he finally passed and wept for joy.

sentence: 工厂为全体职工提供免费午餐。
pinyin: Gōng chǎng wèi quán tǐ zhí gōng tí gōng miǎn fèi wǔ cān.
english: The factory provides free lunch for all employees.

sentence: 他在北京投资了一些房地产。
pinyin: Tā zài Běijīng tóuzī le yīxiē fángdìchǎn.
english: He invested in some real estate in Beijing.

sentence: 中国大使出席了开幕式。
pinyin: Zhōng guó dà shǐ chū xí le kāi mù shì.
english: The Chinese ambassador attended the opening ceremony.

meaning: 1. to oversee; 2. to take charge of; 3. to supervise; 4. to administer
sentence: 食品安全需要严格监管。
pinyin: Shípǐn ānquán xūyào yángé jiānguǎn.
english: Food safety requires strict oversight.

meaning: to be at home; (at a workplace) to be in (as opposed to being away on
sentence: 周末我喜欢在家休息。
pinyin: Zhōu mò wǒ xǐ huān zài jiā xiū xi.
english: On weekends I like to rest at home.

sentence: 局长今天主持了年度工作会议。
pinyin: Júzhǎng jīntiān zhǔchí le niándù gōngzuò huìyì.
english: The bureau chief presided over the annual work meeting today.

meaning: 1. to call into question; 2. to question (truth or validity)
sentence: 有人对这项研究的结果提出了质疑。
pinyin: Yǒu rén duì zhè xiàng yánjiū de jiéguǒ tíchū le zhì yí.
english: Someone called into question the results of this study.
